turns.q: I placed an order a few days ago and still have no tracking — where is it?
turns.replyTail:
Modern's support assistant. I can help with orders, tracking, product questions, and more!

Today
I placed an order a few days ago and still have no tracking — where is it?

Hi — I’m happy to check that for you.

Please send your order number (it should start with SM) or the email used at checkout, and I’ll look into the status.

If you can’t find it, check your inbox or spam folder for your Order Confirmation email from us. Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with!

turns.q: How long does it normally take to ship and send a tracking number?
turns.replyTail:
4–8 business days for shipping
total: about 5–11 business days

Tracking is usually sent once the order ships, so it’s normal not to have a tracking number during the fulfillment window.

If your order includes personalization, the total timeline is usually 10–16 business days.

Most orders arrive closer to the lower end of the timeline. You can also check our shipping info here: https://www.simplemodern.com/pages/shipping

Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with!

Powered by Siena

turns.q: Once it ships, how long is delivery?
turns.replyTail:
Most orders arrive closer to the lower end of the timeline. You can also check our shipping info here: https://www.simplemodern.com/pages/shipping

Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with!

Once it ships, how long is delivery?

Once your order ships, delivery usually takes 4–8 business days. Most packages arrive toward the quicker end of that range! If you need more details, you can check out our full shipping info here: https://www.simplemodern.com/pages/shipping

Powered by Siena

turns.q: Is there any way to speed it up if I need it sooner?
turns.replyTail:
odern.com/pages/shipping

Is there any way to speed it up if I need it sooner?

I totally get wanting your order as soon as possible! Right now, we don’t offer expedited shipping—so all orders go out with our standard shipping times. The good news is, our team works super quickly, and most orders arrive sooner than the maximum timeline we quote.

You can find all the details here: https://www.simplemodern.com/pages/shipping

Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with!

Powered by Siena

turns.q: What should I do if the tracking never updates?
turns.replyTail:
back out to us with your SM order number.
If it shows a delivery exception and hasn’t moved for 24+ hours, or it’s been more than 8 business days since it shipped with no real update, please file a claim here: https://claims.simplemodern.com
You’ll need your order number when you submit the claim.

If you want, send me your order number and I can help point you to the right next step. Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with!

How did we do? We'd love your feedback!

Powered by Siena

turns.q: How do I find my tracking link?
turns.replyTail:
mail from us once the order has shipped. It’ll include the tracking number and a link you can click directly.

You can also:

check your inbox and spam folder
search for emails from Simple Modern
look for your order confirmation first, then the shipping confirmation that comes after it

If you still can’t find it, send me your order number that starts with SM or the email used at checkout, and I’ll help you check the status. Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with!

Powered by Siena
